info.name: Clan of the Blademaster
info.description: The Blademaster subclass for the Crusader.
info.author: Guzufu

description.p: Blademasters are the epitome of using offence as their best defence. They are just as capable of defending their allies as any other crusader but they do so with talented bladework to quickly and efficiently dispatch their foes.

You know how and where to strike to weaken an enemy and make them less dangerous when striking. When you hit a creature with your first melee attack on your turn, attacks that creature makes until the start of your next turn has a penalty to damage rolls equal to your Strength modifier.

sheet.description: When you hit a creature with your first melee attack on your turn, attacks that creature makes until the start of your next turn have a {{strength:modifier}} penalty to damage rolls.

description.p: Your training and wisdom grants you greater boons both in and out of combat. You gain proficiency in one of the following skills; Animal Handling, Insight, Medicine, Perception, Survival. In addition, you also gain proficiency in Wisdom saving throws.

You carry a powerful aura that improves your allies damage as well as your own. Whenever a creature within your Crusader Ward, including yourself, makes an attack with a weapon that does piercing or slashing damage, they can add a bonus to damage equal to your Strength modifier.

sheet.description: Whenever a creature within your Crusader Ward, including yourself, makes an attack with a weapon that does piercing or slashing damage, they can add {{strength:modifier}} damage.

description.p: You are a master of pushing the advantage of a fight. After you hit a creature with the Attack action on your turn, you can make one additional melee attack against the same creature as part of the same action.

sheet.description: After you hit a creature with the Attack action on your turn, you can make one additional melee attack against the same creature as part of the same action.

element.name: Wisdom of the Blade Feature Replacement
